title: Password Health
subtitle: Weak, reused, and stale logins - checked entirely in your browser.
allClear: No issues found. Your logins look healthy.
privacyNote: Every check runs locally after decrypting items in your browser. No passwords, hashes, or scores are ever sent to the server.

weak.title: Weak passwords
weak.description: Easy to guess or crack. Replace these with stronger ones.

reused.title: Reused passwords
reused.description: The same password is used by more than one login.

stale.title: Stale logins
stale.description: Not updated in over a year. Consider rotating these.

breach.title: Check for breaches
breach.description: See whether any of your passwords appear in known data breaches, using HaveIBeenPwned's k-anonymity range API.
breach.error: The breach check could not be completed. Please try again.
breach.confirmMessage: This sends only the first five characters of each password's SHA-1 hash directly to api.pwnedpasswords.com. Your passwords and their full hashes never leave this browser, and nothing is sent to the vaultctl server.
breach.privacyNote: Only the first five characters of each SHA-1 hash are sent, directly to api.pwnedpasswords.com. Your full passwords and hashes never leave your browser, and the vaultctl server is not involved.
